title: Jana Margam Tharayao
lyrics:
Kadayeni thallmal kariyetruvai.. Kadayeni thallmal kariyetruvai..
Guru un kadai kannal arul katti kali kooluvai
Adi mudiyil aada ahala Gana Koulunthu avan
Aadharavu unniai andri yaroo
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=xq_J7_I3_sc
<<PAGE:202>>
Jana markam tharayao…
Jana Oliyai Varayeo.. [Jana]
Idayahtil umami Poojithom..
Irakkam Kolla Vendume…
Sri Guru Ragavendra..
Saranam..Saranam.. Sathuguru deva [Jana]
Bhathik markam tharayeo..
Jana Oliyai Varayao..
Thunga Theerathil Amarndiruthu..
Thooya Anbai tharuveerao//
KAliyuga theivam nee thano
KArunai kadalum nee thano..
KAlamellam kathida vendrum…
Enthan kavailakal ellam Pokkida vendru [Jana]
Bhathik markam tharayeo..
Jana Oliyai Varayeo..
Ragavendra. Ragavendra..Raghava..
Sri Ragavendra. Ragavendra..Raghava..
SARASWATHI SONGS
